name: Feature request

title: "[Feature] "

---

## Problem or opportunity

What is missing, frustrating, or worth improving?

## Proposed direction

Describe the change you would like to see.

## Why it matters

Who benefits, and how?

## Extra context

Examples, related tools, mockups, or workflow notes.
